title: Resources to learn advanced dashboarding, analytics, reporting
excerpt: Hi! Newer user - I’ve been creating dashboards for our team, but need to create some widgets/content that’s more advanced. Also, would like to be able to create reports and more advanced analytics. I can’t find any resou…

posts.author: Karen_R (Karen Ramsey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Newer user - I’ve been creating dashboards for our team, but need to create some widgets/content that’s more advanced. Also, would like to be able to create reports and more advanced analytics. I can’t find any resources (YouTube, Monday training, etc.) that go deeper than creating a dashboard and widgets. I know there are also plug-in apps that probably do some of what I need. Recommendations on how to train myself on more advanced analytics and reporting functionality?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you checked out the Monday Academy? monday academy | Skills, Training, Courses, Webinars & Certifications

posts.author: Karen_R (Karen Ramsey)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you - I’ve looked but the only resource listed there is for the standard dashboard building lesson. Trying to get more detail on some specific use cases and how to learn what a can do with/without apps, or with limited coding options, etc.

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Karen_R you can find some relevant documentation for the Screenful Analytics & Reports add-on:

  • What metrics can I track with Screenful?
  • Creating charts using different monday.com column types
  • The Screenful Knowledge base

Also happy to share my insights regarding what kind of analytics is possible with Monday/Screenful. You can DM me or email to support@screenful.com.
